'''tovashaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:bypassable|bypassable]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-v-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:bypassable|bypassable]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| tovashaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tovashithi|tovashithi]] || [[word:tovashiji|tovashiji]] || [[word:tovashishi|tovashishi]] || [[word:tovashiki|tovashiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tovashuthuthu|tovashuthuthu]] || [[word:tovashujuju|tovashujuju]] || [[word:tovashushushu|tovashushushu]] || [[word:tovashukuku|tovashukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tovashuthu|tovashuthu]] || [[word:tovashuju|tovashuju]] || [[word:tovashushu|tovashushu]] || [[word:tovashuku|tovashuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tovashufthuf|tovashufthuf]] || [[word:tovashufjuf|tovashufjuf]] || [[word:tovashufshuf|tovashufshuf]] || [[word:tovashufkuf|tovashufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tovashethe|tovashethe]] || [[word:tovasheje|tovasheje]] || [[word:tovasheshe|tovasheshe]] || [[word:tovasheke|tovasheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tovashothotho|tovashothotho]] || [[word:tovashojojo|tovashojojo]] || [[word:tovashoshosho|tovashoshosho]] || [[word:tovashokoko|tovashokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tovashotho|tovashotho]] || [[word:tovashojo|tovashojo]] || [[word:tovashosho|tovashosho]] || [[word:tovashoko|tovashoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tovashofthof|tovashofthof]] || [[word:tovashofjof|tovashofjof]] || [[word:tovashofshof|tovashofshof]] || [[word:tovashofkof|tovashofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:tovashïfthïf|tovashïfthïf]] || [[word:tovashïfjïf|tovashïfjïf]] || [[word:tovashïfshïf|tovashïfshïf]] || [[word:tovashïfkïf|tovashïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:tovashïfthïfthïf|tovashïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:tovashïfjïfjïf|tovashïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:tovashïfshïfshïf|tovashïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:tovashïfkïfkïf|tovashïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:tovashïfthïf|tovashïfthïf]] || [[word:tovashïfjïf|tovashïfjïf]] || [[word:tovashïfshïf|tovashïfshïf]] || [[word:tovashïfkïf|tovashïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:tovashïfthïf|tovashïfthïf]] || [[word:tovashïfjïf|tovashïfjïf]] || [[word:tovashïfshïf|tovashïfshïf]] || [[word:tovashïfkïf|tovashïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tovashæthæ|tovashæthæ]] || [[word:tovashæjæ|tovashæjæ]] || [[word:tovashæshæ|tovashæshæ]] || [[word:tovashækæ|tovashækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tovashathatha|tovashathatha]] || [[word:tovashajaja|tovashajaja]] || [[word:tovashashasha|tovashashasha]] || [[word:tovashakaka|tovashakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tovashatha|tovashatha]] || [[word:tovashaja|tovashaja]] || [[word:tovashasha|tovashasha]] || [[word:tovashaka|tovashaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tovashafthaf|tovashafthaf]] || [[word:tovashafjaf|tovashafjaf]] || [[word:tovashafshaf|tovashafshaf]] || [[word:tovashafkaf|tovashafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:tovashasha|tovashasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:tovashësha|tovashësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tovashrosha|tovashrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tovashmusha|tovashmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:tovashyasha|tovashyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotovashnkshësha|gotovashnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotovashnkrosha|gotovashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotovashnkmusha|gotovashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotovashnkyasha|gotovashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:tovavashasha|tovavashasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:tovavashësha|tovavashësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tovavashrosha|tovavashrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tovavashmusha|tovavashmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tovavashyasha|tovavashyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotovavashnkshësha|gotovavashnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotovavashnkrosha|gotovavashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotovavashnkmusha|gotovavashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotovavashnkyasha|gotovavashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:tevæshasha|tevæshasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:tevæshësha|tevæshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tevæshrosha|tevæshrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tevæshmusha|tevæshmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tevæshyasha|tevæshyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotevæshnkshësha|gotevæshnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotevæshnkrosha|gotevæshnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotevæshnkmusha|gotevæshnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotevæshnkyasha|gotevæshnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:tovfashasha|tovfashasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:tovfashësha|tovfashësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tovfashrosha|tovfashrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tovfashmusha|tovfashmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tovfashyasha|tovfashyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotovfashnkshësha|gotovfashnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotovfashnkrosha|gotovfashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotovfashnkmusha|gotovfashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotovfashnkyasha|gotovfashnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
